summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Fee Status tab, WhatsApp template messaging with phoneNumberId, and Event notification features. All new functionality working correctly with 92/92 backend tests passing.
passed_tests: Fee Status tab exists with class/section dropdowns and Load button
Fee Status tab has Export button for CSV and Excel downloads
Fee Status backend API /api/fees/status returns student fee data correctly
Fee Status export API /api/fees/status/export works for both CSV and Excel formats
WhatsApp Settings page shows Phone Number ID field (not API URL)
WhatsApp Settings displays all template configurations (fee_paid_bill, absent_hifg, holi)
WhatsApp Settings save functionality working with phoneNumberId field
Event Calendar Add Event form has 'Send WhatsApp notification' checkbox
Event notification checkbox is functional (toggles between checked/unchecked)
Event creation with sendNotification=true works via backend API
Role-based navigation working (admin sees 11 items, teacher sees 4 restricted items)
All 92 backend API endpoints passing with 100% success rate
WhatsApp template functions exist in backend (fee_paid_bill, absent_hifg, holi)
Database connection working with external MongoDB at 38.242.216.156

success_percentage.backend: 100% (92/92 tests passed, including new Fee Status and Event notification endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all new UI features working: Fee Status tab, WhatsApp phoneNumberId settings, Event notification checkbox)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (frontend-backend integration working correctly for all new features)
